MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Robert F. Cohen, Esq., for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is dissolved. The court grant plaintiff's oral motion to dismissed this case without prejudice. Case is dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings not reported. (610)
